title: oxycoccus oxycoccos subsp. intermedius
intro: Oxycoccus oxycoccos subsp. intermedius, also known as the intermediate lowbush blueberry, is a subspecies of the lowbush blueberry plant native to North America. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in the healing of wounds. The health benefits of Oxycoccus oxycoccos subsp. intermedius include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and provide protection against certain types of cancer. Oxycoccus oxycoccos subsp. intermedius can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its berries can be eaten fresh or used in jams and preserves.
